title: Extract shared util and update call sites
prompt:
This repo has duplicated slugify logic in `src/posts.js` and `src/users.js`. Extract a shared `slugify(text)` into `src/slugify.js`, update both modules to import it, and make `npm test` pass. Do not change test expectations. Prefer file_view/file_edit/write_file over dumping whole files via bash.

IMPORTANT: Plans written in assistant_message are NOT applied. You MUST call write_file / file_edit tools to create and edit files, then run `npm test` via bash before finishing.
